postmark.Subject: Refinance — Jennifer Tran (high LTV)
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

Refinance for Jennifer Tran. LTV is elevated at 82% — strong income and credit support it.

Property: 287 Glencairn Avenue, Toronto, ON M5N 1V3
Appraised: $900,000
Loan amount: $738,000

Package attached.

Exit strategy: borrower intends to sell the property at end of term.

Jason Mercer
Mercer Mortgage Group
Lic. #M12001505
